finding: Guidance session start can emit `node atm.mjs upgrade --propose --behavior behavior.split --dry-run --json` as the next command even though the upgrade command requires `--atom`, producing an immediate ATM_CLI_USAGE failure.
expectedBehavior: When routing a free-text split/refactor goal, ATM should either include the required atom target in the proposed upgrade command or route to candidate discovery/task-card authoring until a concrete atom target is selected.
evidenceOrRepro: During the 2026-07-17 RFT completion audit, `node atm.mjs start --cwd . --goal "Continue governed RFT atom-map refactor cards..." --json` returned the split dry-run upgrade command without --atom. Running that command failed with `ATM_CLI_USAGE: upgrade requires --atom`.
followUp: Add a guidance regression for split goals without explicit atom ids and make the nextCommand target-selection aware before suggesting upgrade --propose.
